'''Midakinos''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Ovise V]], in the [[Ovise system/Legends|Ovise system]] of the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]].<ref name="gamer9" />

Midakinos was a barren, [[Temperature/Legends|frigid]] satellite, and the fourth moon of Ovise V. It was inhabited by 200,000 [[Human/Legends|Humans]], though the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] required the population to wear [[Breath mask/Legends|breath masks]]. A day lasted for 31 [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]] and its orbital period lasts 300 [[Standard day/Legends|standard days]]. The moon's [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] was 90% of standard.<ref name="gamer9" />
